overview: DemonZeno (DMNZ) is an anime-inspired meme token and free trading signals platform. It features a unified DemonZeno AI powered by 50+ AI providers for real-time crypto, forex, and stock signals, an AI-powered FAQ system, admin dashboard, community features, and a full token launch roadmap toward April 2028.
features: Unified DemonZeno AI with 50+ providers — real-time signals, Q&A, code writing
AI signal generator with Entry, Stop Loss, TP1/TP2/TP3 on every response
AI-powered FAQ and Token FAQ chatbot (fully backend-driven)
Signal management, community voting, testimonials wall
DMNZ token launch sections with hype bar, countdown, burn tracker
Cinematic anime open-road design with custom cursor and animations
Full PWA, SEO, accessibility, and micro-interactions
